summary: Comprehensive frontend smoke + integration testing for GigVorx SaaS MVP (React 19 + localStorage). All critical user flows verified end-to-end via Playwright against public URL https://brief-builder-34.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend NOT tested per request (app is fully frontend with localStorage persistence). 100% of tested flows passing.

tested_flows.landing_page: PASS - hero, niche pills, features, testimonials, CTA, login/signup, pricing link all render
tested_flows.pricing_public: PASS - 4 plan cards (Starter, Pro, Premium, Agency) with Most Popular badge
tested_flows.signup_flow: PASS - creates account, redirects to /dashboard, '7d trial left' badge visible in header and sidebar
tested_flows.demo_login: PASS - Fill demo credentials prefills demo@gigvorx.com/demo1234, login navigates to /dashboard
tested_flows.admin_login: PASS - admin@gigvorx.com/admin1234 logs in, [data-testid=nav-admin] sidebar item shows, user dropdown shows Admin Panel link, /admin renders Total Users (2), Active Trials (1), Paid Users (1), Revenue (MRR), Signups chart, Plan Distribution (Trial 50%, Agency 50%)
tested_flows.sidebar_navigation: PASS - all 6 nav items (Dashboard, Clients, Briefs, Invoices, Analytics, Settings) work via data-testid
tested_flows.top_header: PASS - trial-status-badge shows '7d trial left', header-upgrade-btn present, user-menu-trigger opens dropdown with Profile/Billing/Admin (admin only)/Logout
tested_flows.breadcrumbs: PASS - Home > Section breadcrumb visible on every protected page
tested_flows.clients_crud: PASS - Add client via /clients/new with only Name required works, appears in /clients list, search works
tested_flows.briefs_flow: PASS - New brief opens niche picker, web-design selection loads BriefEditor with all 7 sections (Project Overview, Client Details, Requirements, Timeline, Budget, Deliverables, Notes), Add/Remove Question, Preview, Download PDF, WhatsApp share buttons all present
tested_flows.invoices_flow: PASS - Auto INV-XXX number generated, 3 templates (Classic, Modern, Minimal), save persists, list shows invoice. Status filter pills (all/draft/pending/paid/overdue) render
tested_flows.analytics: PASS - Revenue, Pending, Conversion, Overdue cards visible
tested_flows.pricing_app: PASS - 4 plans render with 4 Upgrade buttons for logged-in user
tested_flows.settings: PASS - Profile (Name/Email), Business info (Name/Email/Phone/Address), Save buttons, Current plan with Trial badge all present
tested_flows.persistence: PASS - Created client 'PersistTest Client' persisted after page.reload(). Dashboard recent activity correctly showed created invoice/brief/client
tested_flows.per_user_isolation: PASS - admin user does NOT see demo's TEST Acme Corp client (verified empty admin clients list)
tested_flows.mobile_menu: PASS - [data-testid=mobile-menu-toggle] hamburger present on 390x844 viewport, opens drawer with nav items
tested_flows.console_errors: PASS - No JS errors or React warnings detected across all flows

critical_code_review_comments: Hamburger testid is 'mobile-menu-toggle' (not 'mobile-menu-trigger' as one might expect from the user-menu-trigger pattern) — minor inconsistency but not a bug; works as documented in AppLayout.jsx
All interactive elements have proper data-testid coverage. Good testability hygiene.
localStorage-per-user namespacing (gv_v1:<userId>:<resource>) correctly isolates data between users — confirmed empirically
No backend usage as designed — FastAPI/MongoDB backend is untouched and not part of this MVP
test_credentials: Demo: demo@gigvorx.com / demo1234 (trial). Admin: admin@gigvorx.com / admin1234 (agency, role=admin). Both seeded automatically by AuthContext on first load.
seed_data_creation: Created 'PersistTest Client' under demo account during persistence test; created 'TEST Acme Corp' client, 'Web Design' brief, INV-001 invoice during first run (cleaned up via subsequent localStorage.clear() during admin retesting). No persistent test pollution because data is local to browser session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only MVP. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for testing. Note: each browser_automation tool call gets a fresh browser context (no localStorage shared between calls), so persistence MUST be tested within a single Playwright call via page.reload(). data-testids are well-defined and reliable. Mobile hamburger testid is 'mobile-menu-toggle'. Backend FastAPI/MongoDB is not used by this app.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all flows green.
